message:
test(e2e): Improve E2E, search caching, and CLI index tests

Enhance integration and E2E test coverage with better fixture handling,
improved assertions, and broader scenario coverage.

tests/e2e_multi_connector.rs (+77 lines):
- Extended multi-connector scan validation
- Improved fixture setup for cross-connector scenarios
- Better error messages for debugging failures
- Coverage for connector interaction edge cases
- Verification of unified result merging

tests/search_caching.rs (+34 lines):
- Cache invalidation scenario testing
- Multi-term query caching behavior
- Cache key generation verification
- Stale cache handling improvements
- Performance regression guards

tests/cli_index.rs (+22 lines):
- Index command option parsing tests
- Full/incremental mode verification
- Watch mode initialization checks
- Data directory override handling
- Error handling for invalid paths

Test infrastructure improvements:
- Consistent use of tempfile for isolation
- Better cleanup on test completion
- More descriptive assertion messages
- Reduced test interdependencies

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
